village_can_disenchant_up_to_rarity[1]: Can Disenchant Magic or Rare Equipment Items
village_can_disenchant_up_to_rarity[2]: Can Disenchant Magic, Rare or Unique Equipment Items

village_can_recombinate_up_to_X[2]: Can Recombinate Weapons, Armour, Jewellery and Idols
village_can_run_maps_up_to_tier[0]: Atlas Runners can run White Maps

village_can_run_maps_up_to_tier[3]: Atlas Runners can run White, Yellow, Red and Purple Maps
village_can_ship_to_x_ports[1]: Can Ship to Riben Fell and Ngakanu
village_can_ship_to_x_ports[2]: Can Ship to Riben Fell, Ngakanu and Pondium
village_can_ship_to_x_ports[3]: Can Ship to Riben Fell, Ngakanu, Pondium and Te Onui
village_can_ship_to_x_ports[4]: Can Ship to Riben Fell, Ngakanu, Pondium, Te Onui and Kalguur

village_can_smith_ores_up_to_rank[4]: Can Smelt Crimson Iron, Orichalcum, Petrified Amber, Bismuth and Verisium Ores
